title: Operational Data Store
description: Database optimized for frequent queries on transactional data, updated during business operations and typically serving as an interim staging area for a data warehouse.

definitions.definition: Database optimized for frequent queries on transactional data, updated during business operations and typically serving as an interim staging area for a data warehouse.
